name: Entra Risky Duplicate Account Emails
description: Detects duplicate active entra_risky accounts sharing the same email identity.
query: SELECT LOWER(TRIM(u.user_principal_name)) AS email, COUNT(*) AS account_count FROM entra_risky_users u WHERE 1=1 AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.user_principal_name), '') != '' GROUP BY LOWER(TRIM(u.user_principal_name)) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
remediation: Consolidate duplicate identities and remove unintended duplicate access paths.
